components: H1 headline;subheadline;dual CTA (primary/ghost);hero image or demo video
conversion_role: First impression and primary conversion entry; reduce bounce by naming the problem in the first 5 seconds

components: Outcome-driven H1;one-line value prop;single primary CTA;product UI screenshot
conversion_role: Communicate the end benefit before features; raises above-the-fold conversion intent

components: Split layout;headline + bullet value props left;inline signup/lead form right
conversion_role: Capture intent at peak attention; shortens path from interest to lead

components: Row of client/partner logos;grayscale filter;"Trusted by N+ companies" label
conversion_role: Trust establishment; reduces skepticism immediately after hero

components: 3-column grid;icon + short title + 1-2 sentence description;no screenshots
conversion_role: Communicate value props quickly; scannable above the fold

components: Alternating left/right rows;screenshot or video + benefit copy;one feature per row
conversion_role: Educate on specific capabilities; reduce support tickets and pre-sale questions

components: Asymmetric bento grid;feature tiles of varied sizes;icons + short labels + optional demo gif
conversion_role: Visual differentiation and shareability; feels premium

components: Two-state visual (before vs after);annotated metrics delta;short caption
conversion_role: Make the transformation concrete; sharpen desire by showing the gap closed

components: Numbered 3-4 step horizontal flow;icon + step title + one-line description per step
conversion_role: Lower perceived effort; answer "how hard is this" before signup

components: Tab bar with 3-4 personas/roles;each tab shows tailored copy + screenshot
conversion_role: Personalized relevance; reduces pogo-sticking for non-primary persona

components: Quote cards;avatar + name + role + company;optional star rating;3-4 visible with carousel
conversion_role: Overcome objections; peer validation and authority building

components: Single featured customer;logo + headline result metric + quote + link to full story
conversion_role: Concrete proof of ROI; converts evaluators who need a reference account

components: Grid of short video testimonials;play overlay;captions;name + company labels
conversion_role: Higher-credibility proof than text; reduces fear for high-consideration purchases

components: 3-column tiers (Starter/Pro/Enterprise);highlighted middle tier;feature checklist;annual/monthly toggle
conversion_role: Primary revenue conversion point; anchoring with middle tier

components: One plan focus;value framing;money-back or free-trial reassurance line;single CTA
conversion_role: Reduce choice paralysis; push undecided visitors to the one obvious action

components: Accordion with 6-10 common questions;schema markup for SEO;optional search input
conversion_role: Reduce support load; address last-mile objections before purchase

components: Accordion grouped by objection theme (price/security/migration);each answer ends with reassurance
conversion_role: Defuse the specific fears that block conversion at the decision stage

components: Full-width section;headline + single primary CTA;optional email input;contrasting background
conversion_role: Last conversion attempt; captures scrollers who did not convert above

components: Minimal email field + CTA;value prop copy ("Weekly tips for...");privacy reassurance
conversion_role: Builds owned audience; lower commitment than full signup

components: CTA flanked by guarantee badges (free trial;no card;cancel anytime);trust microcopy
conversion_role: Remove perceived risk at the moment of decision; lift CTA click-through

components: 3-5 bold metrics (users;revenue;uptime;NPS) with labels;optional animated count-up
conversion_role: Credibility signal; demonstrates traction and momentum

components: Aggregate rating badges (G2;Capterra;Product Hunt);star average + review count
conversion_role: Third-party validation; borrows trust from recognized review platforms

components: Row of media outlet logos;"As featured in" label;optional pull-quote
conversion_role: Authority transfer from known brands; reassures first-time visitors

components: Feature matrix vs 2-3 named competitors;honest gaps in small print;CTA after table
conversion_role: Converts comparison shoppers; SEO value for "[product] vs [competitor]" queries

components: Two-column contrast (old way vs new way);check/cross icons;short outcome lines
conversion_role: Reframe the status quo as the problem; justify switching cost

components: Logo grid of compatible tools/APIs;count badge;"Connects with N+ tools"
conversion_role: Reduces integration-risk objection; captures existing-toolchain buyers

components: Code snippet block;copy button;link to docs;SDK/language icons
conversion_role: Signals technical credibility; lowers evaluation friction for builders

components: Embedded sandbox or click-through prototype;no signup required;guided tooltip sequence
conversion_role: Highest-intent conversion action; removes fear of commitment

components: Centered video with play overlay;auto-pause;required captions;compelling thumbnail
conversion_role: Increases time-on-page; show-don't-tell to build product confidence

components: Scrolling annotated screenshots;callout labels on key UI;sticky CTA
conversion_role: Guide the eye through value moments; convert visitors who need to "see it work"

components: Transparent-to-frosted header on scroll;logo + nav links + persistent primary CTA
conversion_role: Persistent conversion entry point; recovers scrollers who missed the hero CTA

components: Sticky in-page section nav;active-section highlight;smooth scroll to anchors
conversion_role: Reduce navigation friction on long pages; help high-intent visitors reach pricing fast
